description_long: This barbecue grill features a robust rectangular base with double front doors, likely for storage or access to the fuel compartment. The main grilling area is topped with a large, rounded lid equipped with a central handle and a prominent circular temperature gauge. The grill is flanked by wide, flat side shelves that provide ample space for food preparation or holding utensils. On the right side, a control knob is visible, suggesting gas operation, and a secondary smaller burner or side stove is integrated into the shelf. The exterior is finished in a combination of metallic silver and matte black, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The overall design is sturdy and functional, suitable for outdoor use in parks, backyards, or communal urban spaces.
description: A modern, freestanding barbecue grill with a rounded lid, double-door base, wide side shelves, and a control knob, finished in metallic silver and black.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double-door base, central lid with handle and temperature gauge, and wide side shelves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved lid and the depth of the side shelves, with minimal visible controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the lid and the full width of the side shelves, with the control knob and burner visible on the left.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the side profile of the lid and the side shelf, with no visible controls.
